meta.title: How a space suit almost killed me
meta.description:
I explain how my old soviet era space suit almost killed me (3 times) and I reveal all the "easter eggs" hidden through out my early photo series. Recorded live at PINC Sarasota, December 7th, 2017.

Purchase ANY print featured in this video and MANY others, plus lots of other fun merchandise at - https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

Book me to speak at your school, company or event! - https://everydayastronaut.com/public-speaking/

Video produced by PINC - http://www.pincexperience.com/

Show your support and join our discord channel by becoming Patron - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Translations:
French - Gaëtan Lafitte
